div.style: background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0d2137 0%, #0e6b6b 100%); padding: 48px 0 40px; text-align: center; margin-bottom: 36px;

div.div: ❌ This University ID is not registered in our system. You cannot proceed with registration. Please contact your university coordinator.

div.p:
Thank you, .
Your registration has been received and is pending confirmation.
